title: Ola Cabs Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Ola Cabs Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Ola Cabs Global Group has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ola Cabs Global Group:
Ola Cabs Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ola Cabs Global Group!
